mapper.sql: id, user_id, code, profit, term, tenant_id, created_time, updated_time, expend, income, profit_rate, hold_time, open_time, close_time, trade_count
mapper.insert: insert into stock_history_position (id, user_id, code, profit, term, tenant_id, created_time, updated_time, expend, income, profit_rate, hold_time, open_time, close_time, trade_count ) values (#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{profit,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{term,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tenantId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{expend,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{income,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{profitRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{holdTime,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{openTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{closeTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{tradeCount,jdbcType=INTEGER} )
mapper.update:
update stock_history_position
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
code = #{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
profit = #{profit,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
term = #{term,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
tenant_id = #{tenantId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
created_time = #{createdTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updated_time = #{updatedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
expend = #{expend,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
income = #{income,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
profit_rate = #{profitRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
hold_time = #{holdTime,jdbcType=INTEGER},
open_time = #{openTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
close_time = #{closeTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
trade_count = #{tradeCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update stock_history_position set user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, code = #{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, profit = #{profit,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, term = #{term,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, tenant_id = #{tenantId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created_time = #{createdTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updated_time = #{updatedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, expend = #{expend,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, income = #{income,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, profit_rate = #{profitRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, hold_time = #{holdTime,jdbcType=INTEGER}, open_time = #{openTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, close_time = #{closeTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, trade_count = #{tradeCount,jdbcType=INTEGER} where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert:
insert into stock_history_position (id, user_id, code, profit, term, tenant_id, created_time, updated_time, expend, income, profit_rate, hold_time, open_time, close_time, trade_count) values
(#{item.id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.profit,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.term,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.tenantId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createdTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updatedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.expend,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.income,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.profitRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.holdTime,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.openTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.closeTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.tradeCount,jdbcType=INTEGER})
mapper.delete:
delete from stock_history_position where id in
#{item}
